content: Update the private model held by exactly one actor about other entities. Propose at most two durable claims, using only supplied new memories and IDs. A claim describes an entity; relationships between entities belong elsewhere. Prefer no change for transient actions, weak evidence, or facts already represented. Use an existing claim_id when evidence reinforces or contradicts it. New claims must use evidence_effect supports. Return only SubjectiveClaimUpdateProposal JSON.
